programmes.show_description: Tense action. A single mother on holiday in Morocco is forced to take the law into her own hands after her child is abducted, but ends up being framed for murder.
Thriller with Western star James Coburn. A professor about to start a new job as a government adviser must eliminate all traces of his past as an industrial spy - with deadly consequences.
Horror Channel returns soon.

All hell breaks loose when a woman's handyman starts dating one of her tenants; she files a restraining order and sues him for alleged vandalism.
After a young man is rescued by a family friend, he makes a deal to move in and pay her back; she says he was like a son but sues him anyway.
An evening of tequila drinking evolves into a reckless car ride that ends with an alleged collision.
Squirrels in an attic, trash in the basement and tenant identity confusion come into play when a woman sues her landlord.
A woman who claims her ex-fiancé wasn't ready to get married sues him for alleged loans to buy a motorcycle, make a mortgage payment, and pay his tuition.
A man is accused of making homophobic comments and being rude to a fellow roommate; he sues his ex-roommate for the return of rent and a security deposit.
A $5,000 marijuana drug deal gone wrong is disputed by ex-roommates who fight over alleged damages as a result of a police raid.
After eight weeks of work, a young man says he was injured on the job and sues his boss for $5,000 for an alleged wrongful termination and a workman's comp claim.
After being incarcerated for a year, a man comes home to find that his car has vanished; he thinks it's been repossessed, but an ex-friend claims it is rightfully hers.
Find out what's happening in London today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
Police lead a countrywide manhunt looking for a couple who have killed people at multiple pizza shops. A survivor gives his eyewitness account of the crime.
Soap star Gemma McCluskie's body was found in a suitcase floating in a river. Security footage would reveal who was carrying the suitcase she was found in.
Ambition, greed and gunshots at a Napa Valley winery - how did a bag with $800,000 in cash lead to murder in a vineyard?
In the deadliest train crash in US history, forty-seven were killed and many more injured. Clues to the cause lay etched in twisted steel and buried in the mud of the Bayou Canot.
A fire at Kings Cross Underground Station kills 31 people. Investigators pinpoint the cause of the fire, but it takes state-of-the-art technology to explain why it became deadly.
Find out what's happening in London today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Country music star Lila McCann guest stars as an aspiring singer.
Action adventure, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. An ex-assassin is blackmailed into eliminating a target who is on a expedition, sending the hit-man on a perilous climb up the Eiger.
Crime starring Keanu Reeves. An undercover cop, disillusioned by the death of his wife, is questioned in the murder of an officer and must find evidence to clear his name.
Crime thriller with Justin Timberlake. A student becomes the protege of a corrupt gambling tycoon in Costa Rica, only to come under pressure from the FBI to help bring his boss to justice.
Thriller with Sean Patrick Flanery. When a hospital is taken by terrorists, a decorated veteran is forced to face the demons from his past as he uses all the skills at his disposal to free it.

A man returns home to find his beloved Dachshund maimed and bleeding in a neighbour's backyard.
A landlord accuses his teen tenant's boyfriend of head-butting him during an altercation; when he pushes back, the police are called.
Concerned about the fate of a Pomeranian puppy, a breeder drives 6 hours to rescue the animal from an allegedly negligent pet owner.
A woman being sued by her ex-lover for the return of his belongings claims she had to sell them to survive.
A 13-year-old boy is asked to step out of the courtroom before his family members start fighting over living expenses and a restraining order.
Breaking up via a text message, inappropriate courtroom attire and a used computer come into play when exes dispute custody of a Lenovo laptop.
After dating a single parent for only eight weeks, a woman claims she loaned him money to buy a new truck because his old truck was in danger of being repossessed.
A woman slides into a fire hydrant during an ice storm and totals the car her father's friend was letting her borrow; she admits it was the second car she has totalled.
A woman drops off her two children at daycare and doesn't pick them up for months; she is sued for childcare costs.

In 2003, as the area of Hamblen County, Tennessee struggles with the growing opioid crisis, the body of a local woman is discovered.
1990 was supposed to be a time of new beginnings for Sharon Gill. But this would change in a matter of minutes when she was discovered brutally murdered in her new home.
Nearly four decades after the death of Hollywood star Natalie Wood, investigators reveal new clues, new witnesses and a shocking revelation.
The discovery of vital evidence helps detectives piece together the case.
A woman vanishes without a trace. But, twenty years on, a clump of hair and a dedicated team of scientists uncover the victim's body.
Find out what's happening in London today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern martial arts western. A corrupt sheriff fakes an accident to disguise his murder of a trucker who refused to help his drug smuggling.
Crime thriller starring Mark Wahlberg. A former smuggler heads to Panama to protect his brother-in-law from a ruthless drug lord and to score millions of dollars in counterfeit bills.
Thriller with Christopher Lambert. After witnessing a murder, an executive is marked for death by a ninja cult, but receives help from a modern-day samurai who has an ancestral feud with them.
